interior_core_identity.name: Ministry of Interior – Core Identity
interior_core_identity.description: General activities and leadership of the Ministry of Interior. Includes the Minister's engagements, policy announcements, and strategic direction of the ministry.

interior_strategic_reform.name: Ministry Strategic & Reform Agenda
interior_strategic_reform.description: Reform initiatives within the ministry. Includes passport process automation, prison decongestion reforms, and internal security strategy.

interior_digital_assets.name: Official Digital Assets & Hashtags
interior_digital_assets.description: Official online presence and campaigns. Includes monitoring of official hashtags like #NewPassportProcess, #InteriorReform, and viral social media discussions.

nigeria_immigration_service.name: Nigeria Immigration Service (NIS)
nigeria_immigration_service.description: Immigration and border control. Covers passport issuance, backlog clearance, visa on arrival, boarder patrol, and illegal migration.

nigerian_correctional_service.name: Nigerian Correctional Service (NCoS)
nigerian_correctional_service.description: Prison management and inmate welfare. Covers jailbreaks, prison congestion, inmate rehabilitation, and the change from 'Prisons' to 'Correctional Service'.

nscdc_civil_defence.name: Nigeria Security & Civil Defence Corps (NSCDC)
nscdc_civil_defence.description: Civil defence and critical infrastructure protection. Covers Agro-Rangers, pipeline vandalism, protecting national assets, and private guard regulation.

federal_fire_service.name: Federal Fire Service
federal_fire_service.description: Fire prevention and emergency response. Covers market fires, fire outbreaks, fire safety regulation, and equipment procurement.

cdcfib_oversight.name: CDCFIB Oversight Body
cdcfib_oversight.description: Civil Defence, Correctional, Fire and Immigration Services Board. Covers recruitment, promotion, and discipline of officers in the paramilitary agencies.

nigeria_evisa_system.name: Nigeria E-Visa System
nigeria_evisa_system.description: Electronic visa processing and administration. Covers online visa applications, business visa on arrival functionality, and tourist e-visas.

expatriate_residence_permit.name: Expatriate Residence Permit (CERPAC)
expatriate_residence_permit.description: Regulations for foreigners in Nigeria. Covers CERPAC (Combined Expatriate Residence Permit and Aliens Card), expatriate quota, and monthly quota limits.

interior_emergency_travel.name: Emergency Travel Documents
interior_emergency_travel.description: Issuance of Emergency Travel Certificates (ETC) for Nigerians abroad needed to return home urgently.

interas_governance.name: INTERAS Digital Governance
interas_governance.description: Technological governance systems within the ministry. Covers internal portals and integrated service delivery platforms.

interior_performance_management.name: Performance Management System
interior_performance_management.description: Tracking and evaluation of ministry performance. Covers KPI monitoring for officers and agencies.

interior_legal_regulatory.name: Legal & Regulatory Framework
interior_legal_regulatory.description: Laws governing interior affairs. Includes the Immigration Act, Correctional Service Act, and Marriage Act (Federal Marriage Registry).
